option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Compiled class file *.class
# Log file *.log
# BlueJ files *.ctxt
# Mobile Tools for Java (J2ME) .mtj.tmp/
# Package Files # *.jar *.war *.nar *.ear *.zip *.tar.gz *.rar
# virtual machine crash logs, see http://www.java.com/en/download/help/error_hotspot.xml hs_err_pid* replay_pid*
# Kotlin Gradle plugin data, see https://kotlinlang.org/docs/whatsnew20.html#new-directory-for-kotlin-data-in-gradle-projects .kotlin/

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Android Studio and Gradle .gradle/ .idea/ .DS_Store /build/ /app/build/ local.properties gradle-app.setting .gradletasknamecache .gradle/wrapper/
# IntelliJ IDEA *.iml *.iws *.ipr .idea/ out/ *.apk *.ap_ *.dex
# Android Studio *.jks *.keystore captures/ .externalNativeBuild .cxx
# Generated files bin/ gen/ .classpath .project .settings/
# Compiled class file *.class
# Log file *.log
# BlueJ files *.ctxt
# Mobile Tools for Java (J2ME) .mtj.tmp/
# Package Files *.jar *.war *.nar *.ear *.zip *.tar.gz *.rar
# Virtual machine crash logs hs_err_pid* replay_pid*
# Kotlin Gradle plugin data .kotlin/
# Environment files .env .env.local
# OS files .DS_Store Thumbs.db
# Gradle wrapper files (optional, uncomment if using checked-in wrapper) # gradle-wrapper.jar # gradle-wrapper.properties
# App internal storage (for development/testing) /app/files/
# SharedPreferences and databases *.db *.db-journal *.db-wal *.db-shm *.sqlite *.sqlite-journal /app/shared_prefs/
# Sensitive configuration files (if used) .env .env.local secrets.properties firebase.json
# Credentials and keys (should never be committed) *.p8 *.p12 *.pfx *.jks *.keystore *.key *.pem *.crt **/secrets/** **/credentials/**
# OAuth tokens and credentials **/cached_auth_tokens **/access_tokens
# Cache directories .cache/ **/cache/ /app/cache/
# Crash logs and diagnostics crash_log/ crash_logs/
# IDE temporary files *.swp *.swo *~ .vscode/ *.sublime-workspace *.sublime-project
# Backup files *.bak *.backup *~
# Misc .DS_Store Thumbs.db .directory .project .classpath .c9/ *.launch .settings/ .vscode/* !.vscode/settings.json !.vscode/tasks.json !.vscode/launch.json !.vscode/extensions.json

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
